pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh OUTPUT_PATH variable and task.json prompt instructions.
Confirmed via task description (3 bottom + 2 top + 6 web members = 11 lines) and verifier.py logic checking line_count.
Confirmed via task description (4 nodes on bottom, 3 nodes on top) and verifier.py logic checking node_count.
Confirmed via task description instructing a constraint of exactly 50 mm and verifier.py checking if measured_lengths are between 49.0 and 51.0.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a new 3-bay Warren truss 2D model from scratch. The agent must save the model to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/warren_truss.slvs', containing exactly 11 line segments and 7 nodes (points). The model segments must have an equal length constraint equal to 50.0 mm.
